parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ task_type: 'email.classify', prompt: $json.prompt, trace_id: $json.trace_id || null, allow_escalation: true }) }}

parameters.query:
=SET LOCAL app.current_entity = 'all';

UPDATE emails
   SET classification    = '{{ $json.classification }}',
       confidence_score  = {{ $json.confidence_score }},
       entity_id         = {{ $json.classified_entity_id }},
       processed         = TRUE
 WHERE gmail_message_id  = '{{ $json.gmail_message_id }}'
RETURNING id;

=SET LOCAL app.current_entity = 'all';

WITH new_event AS (
  INSERT INTO events
    (event_type, source, entity_id, payload, payload_signature,
     status, trace_id, parent_event_id, idempotency_key, pipeline_version)
  SELECT
     '{{ $json.event_type }}',
     '{{ $json.source }}',
     {{ $json.classified_entity_id }},
     $pl${{ $json.payload_json }}$pl$::jsonb,
     '{{ $json.payload_signature }}',
     'pending',
     '{{ $json.trace_id }}',
     {{ $json.parent_event_id }},
     '{{ $json.idempotency_key }}',
     '{{ $json.pipeline_version }}'
   WHERE NOT EXISTS (
     SELECT 1 FROM events WHERE idempotency_key = '{{ $json.idempotency_key }}'
   )
  RETURNING id
),
parent_done AS (
  UPDATE events SET status = 'done', processed_at = NOW()
   WHERE id = {{ $json.parent_event_id }} AND status = 'processing'
  RETURNING id
),
audit AS (
  INSERT INTO audit_log
    (pipeline, event_id, trace_id, action, entity_id, record_type, record_id,
     ai_worker, ai_model, pipeline_version, ai_input_hash, ai_raw_output, result)
  VALUES
    ('email_pipeline',
     COALESCE((SELECT id FROM new_event), {{ $json.parent_event_id }}),
     '{{ $json.trace_id }}',
     'classify',
     {{ $json.classified_entity_id }},
     'email',
     {{ $json.email_id }},
     'email_classifier',
     '{{ $json.model_used }}',
     '{{ $json.pipeline_version }}',
     '{{ $json.ai_input_hash }}',
     '{{ $json.ai_raw_output }}',
     'success')
)
SELECT (SELECT id FROM new_event) AS new_event_id,
       (SELECT id FROM parent_done) AS parent_event_id;
